articles.title: Stocks Rally as Trump Signals Iran Deal, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: A rally in Wall Street stocks extended into Asia after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising hopes for a diplomatic end to the conflict. Oil dropped.

articles.title: Japan’s Stocks Rise as Trump’s Iran Deal Comments Lift Sentiment
articles.summary: Japanese equities rallied after US President Donald Trump signaled the US is close to signing a deal with Iran, fueling expectations that the Middle East conflict is nearing an end.

articles.title: Despite Rout, Indonesia's Danantara Wealth Fund Prices First Dollar Bond for Global Investors

articles.title: Korea’s Kospi Surges 8% as Iran Deal Hopes Lift Chip Stocks
articles.summary: South Korean stocks jumped as risk appetite improved after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran to end the war.

articles.title: Gold Holds Gain as Trump Signals Imminent Peace Deal With Iran
articles.summary: Gold held its biggest gain since March after President Donald Trump said the US could sign a deal with Iran over the weekend to end the war that’s rattled global markets and stoked inflation.

articles.title: SK Hynix ETF Boom Is Becoming a Force in the Stock’s Trading
articles.summary: One of the hottest artificial-intelligence stocks in South Korea is increasingly being driven by demand for products built on top of it.

articles.title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says Deal With Iran Is Close
articles.summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.

articles.title: MediaTek’s Rally Signals Shift From Laggard to AI Contender
articles.summary: MediaTek Inc. shares are poised for their best quarter on record, as investors bet a shift into artificial intelligence chips can help it shed the overhang of its struggling older-tech business.

articles.title: How to Trade the SpaceX IPO in Asia's Locked-Out Markets
articles.summary: Investors across Asia have been largely shut out of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering, which has forced them to find creative ways to make bets on SpaceX’s $75 billion global spectacle.
